title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Rates Remain Strong, Next Leg Depends on Demand - The sharp acceleration in VLCC freight seen in late January appears to have peaked for now.
